'''鈭歬-h-j''' ('''kakahaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xertz|xertz]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xertz|xertz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-h-j
|-
! Lemma
| kakahaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikahaj|thikahaj]] || [[word:jikahaj|jikahaj]] || [[word:shikahaj|shikahaj]] || [[word:kikahaj|kikahaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukahaj|thuthukahaj]] || [[word:jujukahaj|jujukahaj]] || [[word:shushukahaj|shushukahaj]] || [[word:kukukahaj|kukukahaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukahaj|thukahaj]] || [[word:jukahaj|jukahaj]] || [[word:shukahaj|shukahaj]] || [[word:kukahaj|kukahaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukahaj|thukahaj]] || [[word:jukahaj|jukahaj]] || [[word:shukahaj|shukahaj]] || [[word:kukahaj|kukahaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekahaj|thekahaj]] || [[word:jekahaj|jekahaj]] || [[word:shekahaj|shekahaj]] || [[word:kekahaj|kekahaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokahaj|thothokahaj]] || [[word:jojokahaj|jojokahaj]] || [[word:shoshokahaj|shoshokahaj]] || [[word:kokokahaj|kokokahaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokahaj|thokahaj]] || [[word:jokahaj|jokahaj]] || [[word:shokahaj|shokahaj]] || [[word:kokahaj|kokahaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokahaj|thokahaj]] || [[word:jokahaj|jokahaj]] || [[word:shokahaj|shokahaj]] || [[word:kokahaj|kokahaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kahaj|th忙kahaj]] || [[word:j忙kahaj|j忙kahaj]] || [[word:sh忙kahaj|sh忙kahaj]] || [[word:k忙kahaj|k忙kahaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakahaj|thathakahaj]] || [[word:jajakahaj|jajakahaj]] || [[word:shashakahaj|shashakahaj]] || [[word:kakakahaj|kakakahaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakahaj|thakahaj]] || [[word:jakahaj|jakahaj]] || [[word:shakahaj|shakahaj]] || [[word:kakahaj|kakahaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakahaj|thakahaj]] || [[word:jakahaj|jakahaj]] || [[word:shakahaj|shakahaj]] || [[word:kakahaj|kakahaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakahaj|shakahaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakahaj|goshakahaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakahaj|gokishakahaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakahajn眉|shakahajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakahajnkn眉|goshakahajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahajn眉|gokishakahajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakahajsh毛|shakahajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakahajnksh毛|goshakahajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakahajsh毛|gokishakahajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahajro|shakahajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahajnkro|goshakahajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahajro|gokishakahajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahajmu|shakahajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahajnkmu|goshakahajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahajmu|gokishakahajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakahajsher|shakahajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakahajnksher|goshakahajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakahajsher|gokishakahajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakahajng|shakahajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakahajnkng|goshakahajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakahajng|gokishakahajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakahajya|shakahajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakahajnkya|goshakahajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakahajya|gokishakahajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakahajyam|shakahajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakahajnkyam|goshakahajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakahajyam|gokishakahajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahajn眉sh毛|shakahajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahajnkn眉sh毛|goshakahajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahajn眉sh毛|gokishakahajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahajn眉ro|shakahajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahajnkn眉ro|goshakahajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahajn眉ro|gokishakahajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahajn眉mu|shakahajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahajnkn眉mu|goshakahajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahajn眉mu|gokishakahajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahajsh毛n眉|shakahajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahajnksh毛n眉|goshakahajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahajsh毛n眉|gokishakahajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahajsh毛ro|shakahajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahajnksh毛ro|goshakahajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahajsh毛ro|gokishakahajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahajsh毛mu|shakahajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahajnksh毛mu|goshakahajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahajsh毛mu|gokishakahajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahajron眉|shakahajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahajnkron眉|goshakahajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahajron眉|gokishakahajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahajrosh毛|shakahajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahajnkrosh毛|goshakahajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahajrosh毛|gokishakahajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahajromu|shakahajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahajnkromu|goshakahajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahajromu|gokishakahajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahajmun眉|shakahajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahajnkmun眉|goshakahajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahajmun眉|gokishakahajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahajmush毛|shakahajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahajnkmush毛|goshakahajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahajmush毛|gokishakahajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahajmuro|shakahajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahajnkmuro|goshakahajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahajmuro|gokishakahajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
